name: Moga Source
subtitle: Official sideloading source for Moga
description: This is the official sideloading source for Moga, a reader based on MangaDex. Use this if you don't want to deal with TestFlight.

apps.name: Moga
apps.subtitle: A pretty nice manga reader if I do say so myself
apps.localizedDescription:
Moga is a manga reader app built to interface with MangaDex's vast library, with usability and gesture-based UX design at its core.

- Read anything available in MangaDex's library directly
- Log in to your account
- Follow/unfollow mangas
- See recently updated mangas you've followed
- Easy pick-back-up shortcuts (client side)
- Minimize/juggle two mangas at the same time (client side)
- Set language/content preferences (client side)
- And so on.

This app requires that you generate a private client ID if you wish to log in. See https://moga.moe for more info.

By default the app is in safe mode, but there is an nsfw-enabling mode if you go into About and tap the cats three times.

versions.localizedDescription:
# release/1.0.1-5

Changes since release/1.0.1-4

- 1.0.1 Build 5 (5ba0eec, 2026-03-12)
- Fix pull-up-read not resetting on iPad (3ad6c67, 2026-03-12)
- Fix Home chapter segue for Pick Back Up (5abab8b, 2026-03-12)
- Use high-resolution icon on onboarding screen (3d5ce92, 2026-03-12)

# release/1.0.1-4

Changes since release/1.0.1-3

- 1.0.1 Build 4 (6eff5e4, 2026-03-12)
- Better align PBU cell contents (d6dc3ac, 2026-03-12)
- Move Pick Back Up actions to context menu (ba857d8, 2026-03-12)
- Add MangaDex last-read check to Pick Back Up (2f6d1f3, 2026-03-12)
- Populate chapter data when resuming from pick back up (01ccb5f, 2026-03-12)

# release/1.0.1-3

Changes since release/1.0.1-2

- 1.0.1 Build 3 (ba240a5, 2026-03-11)
- Always show content settings (28fc0fd, 2026-03-11)
- Localizations for onboarding (5f92a5b, 2026-03-11)
- Fix deprecation warnings (d4243f7, 2026-03-11)
- Fix welcome covers leaking NSFW content via recently-added endpoint (e94ec51, 2026-03-11)
- Layout update to accomodate iPad (e0d8bd2, 2026-03-10)
- Adjust iPhone welcome onboarding layout (0584475, 2026-03-10)
- Fix Moga label truncation: span full width, pill overlays on top (3088f7e, 2026-03-11)
- Refine welcome hero: larger bottom-aligned name, reposition cat body (171d3a1, 2026-03-11)
- Restyle welcome hero: larger name, no subtitle, wider left-aligned pill (b74d1ba, 2026-03-11)
- Fix hero container height — add explicit 72pt heightAnchor (8fc3691, 2026-03-11)
- Fix welcome page: text truncation, pill wrapping, cat position (8edd6a0, 2026-03-11)
- Fix welcome hero layout and settings button sizing (4f6e74b, 2026-03-11)
- Fix onboarding UI issues: no-repeat covers, safe content, cat sizing, settings layout (d5df4e0, 2026-03-11)
- Add first-launch onboarding flow with welcome, explanation, and settings pages (cbbbe04, 2026-03-11)
- Add Curry hanging assets (8ce9e42, 2026-03-10)

# release/1.0.1-1

Changes since release/build-62

- 1.0.1 Build 1 (44557b5, 2026-03-08)
- Add AltStore moga-source.json update to iOS release workflow (4918643, 2026-03-08)
- Style home section caret with circular pill container (a0fe1a3, 2026-03-06)
- Fix crash when parsing MangaDex JSON responses (3a38b03, 2026-03-06)
- Guard JSON parsing against nil response data in services manager (47455ac, 2026-03-06)
- Refactor Home collection views to diffable data sources (4f8d60c, 2026-03-06)
- Delay Pick Back Up load until home data is available (ddfa4a4, 2026-03-04)
Many UI updates and crash fixes.
